zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Vernon於大約1237年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈登 霍爾時，他的父親William de Vernon Lord of Nether Haddon65歲，母親Margaret de Stockport11235歲。他於1250年與Margaret de Vieuxpont在英國德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1321年在他的家鄉享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Vernon于大约1237年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾哈登 霍爾时，他的父亲William de Vernon Lord of Nether Haddon65岁，母亲Margaret de Stockport11235岁。他于1250年与Margaret de Vieuxpont在英国德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1321年在他的家乡享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Vernon was born about 1237, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Vernon Lord of Nether Haddon, was 65 and his mother, Margaret de Stockport, was 11235. He married Margaret de Vieuxpont in 1250, in Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1321, in his hometown, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Vernon est né environ 1237, à Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Vernon Lord of Nether Haddon, avait 65 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Stockport, avait 11235 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Vieuxpont en 1250, à Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1321, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 85 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Vernonが約1237年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハルで生まれた時，父William de Vernon Lord of Nether Haddonは65歳，母Margaret de Stockportは11235歳であった。1250年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアでMargaret de Vieuxpontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1321年に故郷で85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Vernon(이)가 대략 1237년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 하던 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Vernon Lord of Nether Haddon(은)는 65세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Stockport(은)는 11235세였다. 그는 1250년 영국 더비실르에서 Margaret de Vieuxpont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1321년 그의 고향에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Vernon родился около 1237 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Vernon Lord of Nether Haddon было 65 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Stockport, 11235. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Vieuxpont в 1250 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1321 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 85 лет.
